dialog.stepLabel: Head to Ragunna and learn about the recovery efforts from Phoebe

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: O lost souls adrift in surging tides, may your frequencies find peace. May my prayers accompany you back to the high heavens.

items.speaker: Calaris
items.text: Acolyte Phoebe, can our prayers really reach those devoured by the Dark Tide? Or will they also...

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Follow your heart. Do what's right.

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: Yes. A sincere heart can surely pierce through the haze of the Dark Tide!

items.speaker: Calaris
items.text: I see. We will carry on our prayers for the fallen!

options.text: How are the rebuilding efforts going, Phoebe?

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: All the Acolytes dispatched are working tirelessly, but the situation remains grim...

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: Many of the faithful have come seeking aid from the Order. But even more arrive unsure if they can still trust us.

items.speaker: Calaris
items.text: Acolyte Phoebe, I've put together a list of missing Acolytes from the Fabricatorium of the Deep. Acolyte Luther is counting on your help to coordinate the response.

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: Another one? Very well, I'll take care of it right after I finish the list from Ragunna City.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: A name suddenly flashes through your mind: Lenore. Did she go to the Fabricatorium? Could her name be on the list?

items.speaker: Tulio
items.text: We've also encountered a few obstacles in Septimont's Old District. The faithful there are requesting Resonator and Common Echo support.

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: We don't have extra hands to spare. I'll go to Septimont and handle the matter myself!

items.speaker: Calaris
items.text: But Acolyte Phoebe, what about the missing Acolytes from the Fabricatorium? The Privy Council also expects you to brief them in tomorrow morning's meeting.

items.speaker: Tulio
items.text: There's also the Montelli interim shipping agreement to sign, and the Fisalia pharmacists must still be escorted to the hunting grounds to treat the wounded. Acolyte Luther is hoping you can...

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: (Looks like Phoebe is swamped at the moment. Better give her a hand before she gets overwhelmed.)

options.text: I can help cover some of those, Phoebe.

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: No, it's all right. I can take care of it.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Shouldering every responsibility can sometimes be irresponsible in itself.

items.speaker: Calaris
items.text: I couldn't agree more. Acolyte Phoebe, let us share the burden!

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: Leave the tasks in Septimont to me. I've gotten pretty familiar with the area.

items.speaker: Phoebe
items.text: ...Very well. I'll send over the locations and requirements shortly. Thank you, truly.
